memberdef.name: AccQ15Type
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "arith.AccQ15", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(AccQ15Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)AccQ15_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "AccQ15 type.", .tp_methods = AccQ15_methods, .tp_new = AccQ15_new, .tp_init = (initproc)AccQ15_init, }
